list.title: Telephony configurations
list.description: Connect one or more telephony provider accounts. Each campaign uses one configuration; inbound calls are routed to the right one by account ID.
list.emptyDescription: Add one to enable outbound calls and receive inbound calls.
list.phoneNumberCount: {count, plural, one {# phone number} other {# phone numbers}}

warning.title: Webhook public key not configured
warning.bodyOne: 1 Telnyx configuration is missing a webhook public key. Without it, Telnyx call status updates and inbound calls are being rejected. Copy your public key from
warning.bodyMany: {count} Telnyx configurations are missing a webhook public key. Without it, Telnyx call status updates and inbound calls are being rejected. Copy your public key from
warning.path: Mission Control Portal → Keys & Credentials → Public Key
warning.bodyAfter: and paste it into the affected Telnyx configuration below.

toast.setDefaultSuccess: {name} is now the default outbound configuration
toast.callerSetSuccess: {address} is now the default caller ID

deleteDialog.title: Delete configuration?
deleteDialog.description: {name} and all of its phone numbers will be removed. Any campaigns that reference this configuration will block the deletion until they are reassigned.

detail.copyInboundWebhookUrl: Click to copy inbound webhook URL
detail.phoneNumbersDescription: Numbers used as caller ID for outbound and accepted for inbound matching. SIP URIs and extensions are supported alongside PSTN numbers.
detail.noPhoneNumbers: No phone numbers yet. Add one to start placing or receiving calls on this configuration.

deletePhoneDialog.title: Delete phone number?
deletePhoneDialog.description: {address} will no longer accept inbound calls or be available as a caller ID for this configuration.
